nasb.text: The light of the moon will be as the light of the sun, and the light of the sun will be seven times brighter, like the light of seven days, on the day the Lord binds up the fracture of His people and heals the bruise He has inflicted.

esv.text: Moreover, the light of the moon will be as the light of the sun, and the light of the sun will be sevenfold, as the light of seven days, in the day when the Lord binds up the brokenness of his people, and heals the wounds inflicted by his blow.

cnv.text: 耶和華包紮他子民的傷口，醫治他們傷痕的日子，月亮的光必像太陽的光；太陽的光必增加七倍，像七日的光一樣。

ccb.text: 耶和华包扎他百姓的创伤，医治祂子民的伤口时，月亮必发出太阳般的光辉，太阳的光辉必增加七倍，灿烂得好像七个太阳同时发光。

csbs.text: 在耶和华包扎他子民伤口的日子，在治愈他所击打之创伤的时候，月光必像日光，日光必加增七倍，像七日的光一样。
